runners.formComment: Hit the frame again last time when second (26.26) at this track, making it three minor placings in a row. Jumps from the outside. Usually slow to jump but hits the line hard.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 457m at this track beaten 3 lengths (26.40) behind Thrilling Zane in a Class 1/2 on April 9. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
